SEARCH

All Classes and Interfaces

Class
Description
AbstractGenerator
Base class for number generators.
AbstractMenu
Abstract base class for all menu screens in the application.
AbstractSortRunner
Abstract class for running a sorting algorithm in the background.
AbstractVisualizer
Abstract base class for all sorting visualizer windows.
AppConfig
Utility class that loads and exposes application configuration from config.txt.
BarPanel
This class is used to display sorting data as bars.
BenchmarkConfig
 
BenchmarkRunner
 
BogoSort
BogoSort is an algorithm which sorts a list by shuffling it randomly until it happens to be sorted.
BubbleSort
Goes through the list, compares adjacent elements, and swaps them if they are in the wrong order.
BucketSort
This algorithm distributes elements into several buckets, sorts each bucket individually, and then merges them back together.
CocktailShakerSort
Cocktail Shaker Sort is a two-way version of Bubble Sort.
CombSort
Comb Sort is an improved version of Bubble Sort.
CompareController
Controls the side-by-side comparison of two sorting algorithms.
CompareMenu
The menu screen where the user sets up a side-by-side comparison of two sorting algorithms.
CompareSortRunner
Sort runner used for the side-by-side comparison view.
CompareWindow
A class that has a visualizer window that runs two sorting algorithms side by side for comparison.
CsvExporter
 
Demo
 
Demo
Demo class to test that all sorting algorithms work correctly.
EntropyGenerator
Generator that creates a list with a target entropy level based on the proportion of displaced elements.
EntropyGeneratorTest
 
InsertionSorting
This class implements the Insertion Sort algorithm.
Listener
This interface is for listening to events during the sorting process.
LiveStatsPanel
Class that shows sorting statistics in real time.
MainMenu
This class shows the main menu screen .
MenuInterface
Defines the basic actions that every menu screen must implement.
MergeSorting
This class implements the Merge Sort algorithm.
NumberGenerator
Common interface for all number generators.
PancakeSort
Pancake Sort sorts a list using only "flips", which means reversing a prefix of the list up to some index.
QuickSort
QuickSort works by picking a pivot element and rearranging the list so everything smaller than the pivot is on the left and everything bigger is on the right.
RandomGenerator
Generator that creates a randomly shuffled list of integers from 0 to size - 1.
RandomGeneratorTest
 
RealtimeGraphPanel
A class that has a panel that draws a real-time line graph of sorting statistics over time.
ReverseEntropyGenerator
Generator that starts from a reverse-sorted list and applies entropy-controlled displacement.
ReverseEntropyGeneratorTest
 
SingleAlgoMenu
This class shows a menu screen where the user sets up a single algorithm visualization.
SortedGenerator
 
SortedGeneratorTest
 
SortingAlgorithm
Represents a sorting algorithm as a functional interface.
SortingAlgorithmFactory
Factory class that gives a sorting algorithm by name.
SortingAlgorithmsTest
 
SortingListener
This class is used to manage listeners for sorting events.
SortRunner
Sort runner used for the single algorithm visualizer.
SortStats
Keeps track of stats for a sorting algorithm while it runs.
SortStatsTest
 
StatsBarGraphPanel
A class that represents a panel that draws a horizontal bar graph comparing one metric across sorting algorithms.
StatsListener
A listener that tracks sorting statistics like comparisons, swaps, and accesses.
StatsWindow
A class that shows the performance statistics of one or two sorting algorithms.
SwapSortGenerator
 
VisualizationListener
Class that listens to sorting events and updates the visualization in real time.
VisualizerController
Class that controls the single algorithm visualizer.
VisualizerInterface
Defines the basic actions that every sorting visualizer must support.
VisualizerWindow
This class shows the main visualizer window for a single sorting algorithm.
